description: Slice produced by the dep_graph probe (Phase 2 Layer B). The slice root carries a single key 'dep_graph' whose value is the probe's typed output.

dep_graph.description:
Typed slice shape for the future ``DepGraphProbe`` (S4-05).

Three fields: ``graph_path`` (on-disk path to the serialised
``networkx.node_link_data`` JSON, or ``None`` when no graph was built),
``confidence`` (the ADR-0007 ``"high" | "medium" | "low"`` ladder), and
``reason`` (free-form string when ``confidence`` is not ``"high"``).
Frozen + ``extra=forbid`` per Phase 2 model discipline (mirrors
:class:`codegenie.indices.freshness.IndexFreshness`).

errors.description: Forward-compatible per-slice error IDs. Each item matches the ADR-0007 ID pattern.

warnings.description: Soft-degrade signals. Each item matches the ADR-0007 ID pattern.

title: DepGraph probe output
